title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through the company's Professional Development Request Form, which can be found on the HR intranet page. Requests should be submitted at least 30 days prior to the training start date to allow for budget approval and processing. Each employee is allocated an annual training budget of $1,500, which can be used for workshops, courses, certifications, and conferences. To ensure alignment with company goals, please include a brief explanation of how the training will benefit both your personal growth and the organization. Once submitted, your request will be reviewed by your direct supervisor and the HR department. You will receive a response within 10 business days. For any questions or assistance, please contact the HR team at hr@company.com.
